description: Cognitive Work Unit shape library. Drives Heat Map row generation and suggested team composition in the polynize.ai /agents flow. Reference: CWU Design System v0.1. Shape selection driven by Q4 bottleneck category. Human-led = red. Hybrid = amber. Agent-executable = mint/green.

allocation_legend.human-led: Requires trust, judgment, accountability, or live decisions. Human cannot be removed.
allocation_legend.hybrid: Agent drafts or executes under human direction. Human reviews and signs off.
allocation_legend.agent-executable: Structured, repeatable, pattern-based. Runs without human involvement in the task itself.

analysis_and_judgment.what_it_is: A unit that converts information into a recommendation or decision. Multiple parallel research streams feed a synthesis layer, which surfaces a decision surface for the human. The human never touches raw inputs. They review synthesised output and make the call.
analysis_and_judgment.human_center_type: Senior judgment holder. Investment lead, research director, senior advisor, strategy lead.
analysis_and_judgment.structural_signature: Parallel streams → synthesis → human judgment call
analysis_and_judgment.leverage_source: Parallelising research streams, compressing time from question to synthesised decision surface, concentrating human time on judgment not groundwork.

team_roles.title: Research Specialist
team_roles.description: Takes a brief, returns structured research on one domain stream. Standalone value from day one.

team_roles.title: Domain Analyst
team_roles.description: First-pass analysis across a specific research stream, structured for synthesis.

team_roles.title: Synthesis Specialist
team_roles.description: Reconciles parallel streams into a single decision-ready surface for the human.

team_roles.title: Contradiction Detector
team_roles.description: Flags contradictions across streams and surfaces red flags before the human sees the output.

team_roles.title: Memo Specialist
team_roles.description: Drafts recommendation memos in the human's voice, ready for sign-off.

discriminating_signals: We spend too much time on groundwork before we can form a view
Our senior people are doing research that shouldn't need them
We review a lot of deals or candidates and it takes too long

pipeline_and_conversion.what_it_is: A unit that moves opportunities through sequential stages toward a commitment. The human holds the relationship and closes. Agents carry every scaffolding function around the human's live interactions.
pipeline_and_conversion.human_center_type: Relationship holder and closer. Founder, AE, BD lead, partner, recruiter, fundraiser.
pipeline_and_conversion.structural_signature: Sequential stages with human at key gates
pipeline_and_conversion.leverage_source: Eliminating prep and admin burden from human, increasing outreach volume without proportional human time, tightening follow-through.

team_roles.title: Meeting Prep and Intelligence Analyst
team_roles.description: Produces a structured brief before every meeting: company context, contact background, likely objections, suggested angles.

team_roles.title: Targeting and Qualification Specialist
team_roles.description: Identifies and qualifies prospects against the unit's definition of fit, filters noise before it reaches the human.

team_roles.title: Proposal Specialist
team_roles.description: Drafts tailored proposals using the unit's commercial logic, keeps every proposal consistent with the deal state.

team_roles.title: Pipeline Coordinator
team_roles.description: Tracks deal state across the pipeline, surfaces going-cold signals, maintains next-step discipline.

team_roles.title: Outreach Coordinator
team_roles.description: Runs warming sequences and cadence management, keeps prospects moving without manual intervention.

discriminating_signals: I spend too much time on admin around meetings
We're not following up consistently
We can't scale outreach without hiring
I need to be in more conversations but there aren't enough hours

execution_and_delivery.what_it_is: A unit that takes a specification and builds something. The human is the architect and director. Agents carry building, testing, iteration, and structured production.
execution_and_delivery.human_center_type: Architect, technical director, product owner, creative producer, delivery lead.
execution_and_delivery.structural_signature: Spec → decompose → build → test → iterate → deliver
execution_and_delivery.leverage_source: Compressing build cycles, parallelising independent workstreams, eliminating human time on structured work, concentrating human on design and exception handling.

team_roles.title: Orchestrator and Spec Decomposition Agent
team_roles.description: Takes a brief or spec and returns a decomposed, sequenced task list with dependencies. Removes the planning burden immediately.

team_roles.title: Build Specialist
team_roles.description: Executes the core production work inside the defined spec, parallel where work is decomposable.

team_roles.title: QA and Evaluation Specialist
team_roles.description: Checks output against spec, detects regressions, verifies components cohere with each other.

team_roles.title: Integration Coordinator
team_roles.description: Assembles parallel workstreams into a coherent shipped output, manages dependencies.

team_roles.title: Exception Monitor
team_roles.description: Watches for spec drift and edge cases, escalates novel failures to the human architect.

discriminating_signals: We can't ship fast enough
Too much time on repetitive or boilerplate work
We need to produce more output than our team can handle

executive_leverage.q4_trigger: Managing my own time and attention
executive_leverage.what_it_is: A unit built around one high-value human whose attention is the scarce resource. Agents expand the human's reach, reduce coordination loss, and ensure the human's time is concentrated on decisions only they can make.
executive_leverage.human_center_type: Founder, CEO, senior partner, department head, board-level executive.
executive_leverage.leverage_source: Protecting the attention frontier, reducing time from decision to action, eliminating context-switching cost, compressing translation loss between intent and execution.

team_roles.title: Clearing and Triage Specialist
team_roles.description: Triages communications, surfaces what actually needs the human's attention, filters the rest.

team_roles.title: Research and Intelligence Analyst
team_roles.description: Handles research on demand, produces briefs before meetings, maintains strategic context on ongoing workstreams.

team_roles.title: Internal Coordination Specialist
team_roles.description: Manages follow-through on commitments the human has made, tracks what's in flight across parallel workstreams.

team_roles.title: Outreach and Warming Coordinator
team_roles.description: Maintains relationship cadence with external contacts the human doesn't have time to warm themselves.

team_roles.title: Drafting and Synthesis Specialist
team_roles.description: Drafts communications, decks, and documents in the human's voice for review and sign-off.

discriminating_signals: I'm the bottleneck in my own organisation
Too much of my time goes on things that shouldn't need me
I lose track of what's in flight
There's too much to coordinate and things are falling through
domain_examples: department head with wide span of control

relationship_continuity.what_it_is: A unit that maintains ongoing relationships at scale. There is no pipeline end state. The work is continuous. The human holds relationship depth and handles anything requiring genuine trust or judgment. Agents carry monitoring, preparation, routine communication, and follow-through.
relationship_continuity.human_center_type: Account manager, customer success lead, relationship partner, ongoing advisor.
relationship_continuity.structural_signature: Continuous monitoring, human at high-value moments
relationship_continuity.leverage_source: Scaling relationship coverage without proportional headcount, ensuring no account goes dark, concentrating human time on high-value interactions.

team_roles.title: Account Health Monitor
team_roles.description: Tracks engagement signals across accounts and surfaces at-risk relationships before they go cold.

team_roles.title: Engagement Signal Analyst
team_roles.description: Synthesises usage and engagement data into account state summaries the human can act on.

team_roles.title: Review Prep Specialist
team_roles.description: Builds QBR materials and periodic review packs tailored to each account's history and current state.

team_roles.title: Communication Coordinator
team_roles.description: Handles routine check-ins and cadence management, escalates anything requiring human judgment.

team_roles.title: Opportunity Detection Analyst
team_roles.description: Spots expansion and renewal signals early, surfaces them to the human with context ready for the conversation.

discriminating_signals: We can't keep up with all our accounts
We only talk to clients when they reach out to us
We're losing accounts we didn't see coming
Our CS team is stretched too thin

high_volume_operations.what_it_is: An inverted structure. Agents are the primary execution layer handling high-volume, structured work. The human is not the center of the work. The human is the exception handler and quality arbiter.
high_volume_operations.human_center_type: Operations lead, compliance officer, service manager, quality lead.
high_volume_operations.structural_signature: Inverted, agents primary, human handles exceptions
high_volume_operations.leverage_source: Handling volume impossible with human-only processing, concentrating human time on genuinely complex cases, improving consistency of standard processing.

rows.function: Accountability for output quality at scale

team_roles.title: Classification and Routing Specialist
team_roles.description: Assesses every incoming item and routes it correctly. Standalone value at any volume.

team_roles.title: Processing Specialist
team_roles.description: Handles structured, high-volume processing work inside defined scope, parallel where work decomposes.

team_roles.title: Quality Sampling Analyst
team_roles.description: Audits agent output at a sampled rate, flags quality degradation early.

team_roles.title: Exception Detection Specialist
team_roles.description: Identifies work that falls outside the defined agent scope and routes to the human for handling.

team_roles.title: Pattern Reporting Analyst
team_roles.description: Reports on exception rates and patterns, surfaces process drift or input shifts for human review.

discriminating_signals: We can't handle the volume
Too much time on routine processing that feels like it shouldn't need a human
We need to respond faster but we're understaffed
Quality is inconsistent because the team is overwhelmed

creative_direction.what_it_is: A unit where the human's taste and judgment is the generative source, not the review layer. The human sets creative direction. Agents produce variants, handle production, and explore option spaces.
creative_direction.human_center_type: Creative director, brand strategist, editor, designer, content lead.
creative_direction.structural_signature: Human direction → agent generation → human curation → agent production
creative_direction.leverage_source: Expanding what the creative director can produce without expanding headcount, compressing production cycles, enabling broader option exploration before committing.

team_roles.title: Research and Reference Specialist
team_roles.description: Ingests a brief and returns a structured reference pack: competitive examples, relevant trends, inspiration directions.

team_roles.title: Concept Generation Specialist
team_roles.description: Produces variant concepts and option spaces for human curation, not single answers.

team_roles.title: Production Specialist
team_roles.description: Takes curated direction and produces finished output at volume, across formats.

team_roles.title: Adaptation and Formatting Coordinator
team_roles.description: Adapts approved output across channels, formats, and platforms without losing voice.

team_roles.title: Consistency Monitor
team_roles.description: Checks every output against brand and voice standards, flags drift across iteration cycles.

discriminating_signals: We can't produce content at the quality and volume we need
Our creative team is a bottleneck
We want to explore more options before committing
Production is taking too long after the creative direction is set

learning_and_capability.what_it_is: A unit designed to develop human capability at scale. The human expert or L&D lead defines what good looks like and holds the curriculum judgment. Agents deliver, assess, personalise, and surface cohort patterns.
learning_and_capability.human_center_type: L&D lead, subject matter expert, team leader, CHRO.
learning_and_capability.leverage_source: Delivering at scale without proportional expert time, generating individual gap maps, surfacing cohort patterns previously invisible.

rows.function: Content and scenario delivery at scale
Interpretation of cohort patterns in context

team_roles.title: Assessment and Gap Analysis Specialist
team_roles.description: Delivers capability scenarios, scores performance, returns individual gap maps.

team_roles.title: Delivery Specialist
team_roles.description: Runs simulations and scenarios at scale, handles the learner-facing layer without expert time.

team_roles.title: Personalisation Specialist
team_roles.description: Designs adaptive development pathways per individual based on their gap map.

team_roles.title: Cohort Pattern Analyst
team_roles.description: Synthesises individual assessment data into team-level gap maps and development priorities.

team_roles.title: Reporting and Visibility Coordinator
team_roles.description: Surfaces cohort intelligence to leadership in formats ready for workforce and promotion decisions.

discriminating_signals: We don't have visibility into our team's real capability
Training isn't sticking, we don't know if it's working
We can't assess at the scale we need
We need to onboard faster
We want to know who's actually ready before we promote

compound_patterns.description: When a visitor ticks multiple Q4 categories, the top category is the dominant shape. Common secondary pairings below. Use these to augment team composition when a secondary shape is strongly indicated.

common_compounds.description: Research and strategy phase feeding an execution and delivery phase. Common in product launches, market entry, strategic builds.
Executive leverage unit with an embedded pipeline function. Common for founder-led sales operations.
Analysis of capability gaps feeding a development programme. Common in organisational transformation engagements.
